prompt: A dramatic studio product photograph of a standing bag of CRUNCHY CHIPZ centered on a rough black stone pedestal against a deep black background. The packaging is a glossy dark red metallic snack bag with a large orange-yellow comic-style starburst behind the main logo, bold oversized white block letters with black outline for the brand name, and flavor text on the right reading ZESTY CHEDDAR with smaller subtitle text below it. Show exactly 2 triangular orange corn chips printed on the lower front of the bag. Add small fine-print text near the bottom left of the bag reading SAVORY TRIANGLES. Light the scene with intense warm orange side lighting from the upper left, creating strong highlights and glossy reflections on the bag. Surround the product with airborne orange seasoning dust and smoky spice clouds, especially behind the bag and to the left side. Scatter coarse salt crystals and orange-red seasoning powder across the pedestal and foreground surface. The pedestal should be a thick, jagged, matte-black rock slab with sharp fractured edges. Emphasize high contrast, cinematic shadows, crisp product focus, premium commercial advertising style, dramatic food photography, vertical composition, ultra-detailed texture, realistic packaging, and a fiery zesty cheddar mood.
